name: Ken Malwood || ALT-SCENARIO
description:
ALT-SCENARIO || Ken Malwood kidnapped you, sure. But he was a loving husband! Even if he had to force himself into that role. He’d make you see that eventually. He had all the time in the world.

oc / mafia / husband / yandere / anypov / m4a

Notorious crime boss Ken Malwood kidnapped you and now he wants to play house.
creator: Aligaytor
